summary: Motivational banner + adaptive task ordering features verified end-to-end. Backend: 4/4 pytest passed for /api/tasks adaptive contract and completion-order reshuffle across days. Frontend (mobile 390x844): MotivationBanner renders between greeting and level badge with 'LEVELUP · MOTIVATION' kicker + message + chevron, tap navigates to /tasks. Tasks screen shows adaptive-order-hint cyan bar with correct 'Wed, Apr 22' source date, and morning group is reordered to match yesterday's completion order (Pick a clean outfit → Morning reflection → Workout session). Web-safe notifications module imports cleanly and calling scheduleMotivationalNotifications on web no-ops without throwing (verified via page load — no pageerror, only benign expo-notifications push-listener warning).
critical_code_review_comments: Adaptive ordering in list_tasks walks back up to 14 days looking for the most recent day with completions — reasonable heuristic; tasks with no prior completion get rank 10_000 so they fall to end-of-slot within their time_slot (morning < afternoon < evening preserved). Verified.

CompleteTaskBody.date is optional and defaults to today — good; POST /api/tasks/{id}/complete with {date: yesterday} correctly persists task_logs.date=yesterday and completed_at=now() (timestamp-based rank works even when logging historical dates).

MotivationBanner rotating border uses Animated + LinearGradient oversized wheel (250%) — same-direction spin works on web (falls back to JS animation; a benign useNativeDriver warning appears on web which is expected).

notifications.ts correctly short-circuits on Platform.OS==='web' in scheduleMotivationalNotifications, cancelMotivationalNotifications, ensureNotificationPermission, scheduleTaskNotification, syncAllTaskNotifications — confirmed no-throw on web.
Minor: Home uses useState(() => pickMotivation()) so the message is fixed per mount; tapping the banner rotates it (setMotivation + pickMotivation) before navigating — nice touch.
seed_data_creation: Tests reset DB, seeded 8 defaults, and created task_logs for yesterday in order [outfit, reflection, workout]. DB currently sits in adaptive state with those 3 yesterday logs. Onboarding skip_complete=true was applied so Home doesn't redirect.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 acceptance criteria in the review request pass. Backend tests reusable at /app/backend/tests/test_adaptive_order.py (4 tests, ~5s). DB currently has profile onboarding_complete=true, 8 seeded tasks, and 3 yesterday task_logs (outfit, reflection, workout in that order) — so adaptive_order=true on today's GET. Reset via POST /api/profile/reset before unrelated tests.
